HomePage.subtitle: Come celebrate our wedding
HomePage.InvitationText: Please join us on September 26, 2026 as we celebrate our wedding
HomePage.Ceremony-description: The ceremony will take place at the beautiful Davis Manor. Join us to celebrate this special moment.
HomePage.Cocktail-description: Enjoy an elegant cocktail with delicious drinks and appetizers.
HomePage.Reception-description: Join us for an evening of dancing, dining, and celebration.
HomePage.SweetMessage: Thank you for being with us for this beautiful event. Your love and support mean a lot to us, and we look forward to celebrating this moment with you.

Q1.question: What is the dress code?
Q1.answer: The dress code is semi-formal. We want you to feel comfortable and enjoy the day with us.

Q2.question: Can I bring a guest?
Q2.answer: We would love to meet your partner. Please let us know if you are bringing a guest by filling out the RSVP form.

Q3.question: Can I bring my children?
Q3.answer: We love children, however this special occasion is child-free. Thank you for your understanding.

Q4.question: What is the parking situation?
Q4.answer: Parking is available on site. A shuttle will also be available to transport guests from hotels to the wedding and back at the end of the evening.

Q5.question: What is the gift policy?
Q5.answer: Your presence is the best gift we could ask for. However, if you wish to give us something, a monetary contribution would be appreciated.

Q6.question: Can I take photos?
Q6.answer: A professional photographer will be on site to capture the ceremony. We ask that you refrain from taking pictures or videos during this time. After the ceremony, pictures and videos are permitted and welcomed. We look forward to seeing them!

Q7.question: What if I have dietary restrictions?
Q7.answer: Please let us know of any dietary restrictions by filling out the RSVP form.

Q8.question: Is there accommodation nearby?
Q8.answer: Yes, there are several accommodation options near the ceremony venue. Please check our accommodations page for more details and recommendations.

Q9.question: Will there be a shuttle service?
Q9.answer: Yes, a shuttle service will be offered to guests staying overnight at hotels nearby before and after the event. The shuttle is free, but please let us know in advance via your RSVP if you will be requiring the service so we can plan ahead.

RsvpPage.title: Confirm your attendance
RsvpPage.subtitle: We look forward to celebrating with you!
RsvpPage.name: Name
RsvpPage.stayingOnsite: Are you staying on site? If so, at which accommodation
RsvpPage.shuttleInfo: The shuttle will pick up guests staying nearby (15 to 20 minutes by car) from Manoir Davis between 2:30 PM and 3:00 PM, and will bring you back once the evening concludes. The exact schedule will be communicated the week prior to the wedding.

StoryPage.title: Our Story
StoryPage.subtitle: Every love story is beautiful, but ours is our favorite. Here's how our journey began.

Event1.title: First time meeting
Event1.description: We first met at work. A friendship quickly developed, laying the foundation for our future relationship.

Event2.title: First Dates
Event2.description: Our first dates were outdoors, enjoying the beauty of nature while getting to know each other.

Event3.title: Moving In
Event3.description: We decided to take the next step and move in together in Verdun, exploring the neighborhood and enjoying urban life.

Event4.title: Pandemic and Life Together
Event4.description: The pandemic pushed us to spend more time together at home.

Event5.title: Moving to Australia
Event5.description: We packed our bags and moved to Australia for a new adventure together. It was an incredible experience discovering a new country and creating unforgettable memories.

Event6.title: Marriage Proposal in New Zealand
Event6.description: During a trip to New Zealand, Victor proposed to Marie-Lie in a picturesque setting.

Event7.title: Journey Through Asia
Event7.description: Before returning to Quebec, we explored several countries in Asia, discovering new cultures and creating unforgettable memories together.

Event8.title: Return to Quebec
Event8.description: After our adventure in Australia and Asia, we are excited to return to Quebec to be close to you and prepare for our wedding.

AccommodationsPage.title: Accommodations
AccommodationsPage.subtitle: We have reserved rooms at these wonderful accommodations near the venue for your convenience.

Super8.description: Comfortable and affordable accommodations with all the essential amenities.
